answers.answer: Need to see the full question to answer correctly. Please provide the complete prompt for und-39: Stakeholder Intent.

DEPENDENCY RISK ASSESSMENT (Financial Transactions): 1) Bun 1.0 vs Node.js 20 LTS: HIGH RISK - too new, small ecosystem. 2) Hono vs Express/Fastify: MEDIUM - newer but OK. 3) SurrealDB vs PostgreSQL: VERY HIGH - experimental, not for financial data. 4) Drizzle vs Prisma: MEDIUM-HIGH - newer. 5) Redpanda vs Kafka: LOW-MEDIUM - Kafka more battle-tested. 6) Custom JWT vs Auth0/Clerk: CRITICAL RISK - never roll your own auth for financial systems. 7) OpenTelemetry vs Datadog: LOW - industry standard. OVERALL: Very High Risk. Recommend: Node.js 20 LTS + Fastify + PostgreSQL + Prisma + Kafka + Auth0/Clerk + OpenTelemetry.
